description: Build the hex-nexus agent control plane — OpenCode-inspired multi-project interface with SpacetimeDB-native state, SolidJS frontend, queue-driven inference bridge

steps.title: Generate SpacetimeDB TypeScript bindings for hexflo-coordination module
Generate SpacetimeDB TypeScript bindings for agent-registry module
Generate SpacetimeDB TypeScript bindings for chat-relay module
Generate SpacetimeDB TypeScript bindings for inference-gateway module
Generate SpacetimeDB TypeScript bindings for fleet-state module
Fix spacetime_state.rs .connect() — complete Rust WebSocket subscription wiring
steps.notes: Current .connect() returns error because codegen bindings not fully linked. Fix to establish real WebSocket connection.

steps.title: Verify SpacetimeDB module deployment and table queryability
steps.notes: Test browser→SpacetimeDB direct WebSocket connection. Verify all 17 modules deployed.

steps.title: Scaffold Vite + SolidJS + Tailwind CSS 4 project in hex-chat/ui/
steps.notes: Per ADR-038. Structure: index.html, package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts, src/

steps.title: Configure Vite proxy for hex-nexus (5555) and SpacetimeDB (3000)
Create useSpacetimeDB hook — connection management, auth, reconnection
steps.notes: DbConnection builder, auth token from localStorage, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff

steps.title: Create useTable hook — bridge SpacetimeDB onInsert/onUpdate/onDelete to SolidJS signals
steps.notes: Generic hook: useTable<T>(tableName) → Accessor<T[]> that auto-updates on row changes

steps.title: Create stores/connection.ts — DbConnection singleton
steps.notes: Singleton pattern. Subscribes to core tables on connect: swarms, tasks, agents, sessions, inference_endpoints

steps.title: Build App.tsx with 3-column layout (Sidebar, PaneManager, RightPanel, BottomBar)
Implement Sidebar.tsx — projects/agents/swarms lists from SpacetimeDB subscriptions
Implement RightPanel.tsx — inference/fleet/tokens from SpacetimeDB subscriptions
Implement BottomBar.tsx — chat input with slash command detection
Build ChatView.tsx — SpacetimeDB session_messages + WebSocket LLM streaming
steps.notes: Messages from SpacetimeDB subscription, live streaming via WebSocket /ws/chat

steps.title: Implement MessageList.tsx — virtual scroll, sticky headers, auto-scroll
Build Message.tsx — role badges, model indicators, expandable tool calls
Implement ChatInput.tsx — slash command prefix detection

T4.name: Backend OpenAPI + Agent Spawn
T4.notes: Independent of frontend — can run in parallel with T1-T3

steps.title: Add utoipa dependency to hex-nexus Cargo.toml for OpenAPI generation
Annotate stateless routes with utoipa for OpenAPI 3.1 spec
Add POST /api/agents/spawn endpoint for GUI-driven agent spawning
steps.notes: Spawns hex-agent subprocess locally or dispatches to fleet node (ADR-037)

steps.title: Mark state-read routes as deprecated in favor of SpacetimeDB direct access
Serve OpenAPI spec at GET /api/openapi.json
Pane store — binary tree state management with split/close/maximize/resize
PaneManager — recursive tiling renderer with draggable dividers
PaneLeaf — type→component resolver with lazy loading
ProjectCard + ProjectOverview — project grid with health badges and agent counts
FileTree — recursive collapsible file browser with change indicators
TaskBoard — kanban-style task board from SpacetimeDB swarm_task
AgentLog — live agent inspector with heartbeat and task status
Wire PaneManager into App.tsx + keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+\, Ctrl+-, Ctrl+W, etc.)
dashboard.html entry point for SolidJS app + Vite multi-page config
Fix NexusClient auth — persist token to ~/.hex/nexus.token, send Bearer header
steps.notes: Unblocked HexFlo MCP tools and CLI swarm/task commands

steps.title: SpawnDialog — modal for GUI-driven agent spawning via POST /api/agents/spawn
AgentCard — compact status card with kill button and heartbeat age
AgentLog → full AgentInspector with kill/restart controls, memory snapshot, task status colors
Wire SpawnDialog into App.tsx (Ctrl+N) + Sidebar spawn button
Global UI state store (stores/ui.ts) for cross-component dialog control
Fix MCP tool name mismatch — add hexflo_ prefix to swarm/task/memory tools
steps.notes: Tool names now match Claude Code deferred tool registry

steps.title: SwarmMonitor — main swarm visualization pane composing DAG + header + timeline
TaskDAG — SVG dependency graph with BFS layout and live status coloring
SwarmHeader — phase indicator pills + progress bar + agent/task counts
SwarmTimeline — vertical chronological event log with status dots
Register swarm-monitor pane type + sidebar wiring
CommandPalette — Ctrl+P fuzzy search overlay with categories, keyboard nav, ESC close
Command registry store — 11 actions with fuzzy matching and word-boundary scoring
CodeBlock — syntax-highlighted code with keyword/string/comment/number coloring
DiffViewer — unified diff renderer with add/remove/context line coloring
Wire CommandPalette into App.tsx (Ctrl+P toggle) + command palette UI signal

M1.criteria: Chat works in SolidJS with SpacetimeDB-backed message history and live subscriptions

M2.criteria: Tiling pane system with project overview, file tree, task board, agent log. Sidebar items open panes. Keyboard shortcuts for split/close/maximize.

M3.criteria: GUI-driven agent spawning (SpawnDialog), agent inspection with kill/restart/memory, AgentCard, Ctrl+N shortcut. HexFlo MCP tools fully operational.

M4.criteria: Swarm visualization: TaskDAG with SVG dependency graph, SwarmHeader with phase indicator and progress bar, SwarmTimeline with chronological events. Sidebar swarm click opens SwarmMonitor.

M5.criteria: CommandPalette (Ctrl+P) with fuzzy search, categorized actions, keyboard navigation. CodeBlock with syntax highlighting. DiffViewer with unified diff rendering. Command registry with 11 registered actions.

M6.criteria: FleetView with node cards and register form. InferencePanel with provider cards, model badges, register form, and CostTracker. RightPanel headers link to full panes. Commands registered.

M7.criteria: hexflo-cleanup SpacetimeDB module with scheduled cleanup_stale_agents reducer (30s interval), heartbeat tracking, task reclamation for dead agents, cleanup audit log.

M8.criteria: hexflo-lifecycle SpacetimeDB module with automatic phase transitions (SPECS→PLAN→CODE→VALIDATE→INTEGRATE→COMPLETE), tier-based task dependency tracking, phase transition audit log.

M9.criteria: inference-bridge SpacetimeDB module with queue-driven inference (submit→claim→complete), optimistic locking for multi-worker, per-agent token budgets, provider routing table, full audit trail.

M10.criteria: Deprecation middleware on state-read GET routes with X-Deprecated/X-Migration-Target headers. OpenAPI 3.1 endpoint at /api/openapi.json for stateless routes only. Route registration grouped into stateless-compute/deprecated-state/websocket sections. CleanupService conditionally disabled when SpacetimeDB backend is active.

wave2.description: SolidJS scaffold + Vite config (after T0 completes)

wave3.description: Bridge hooks + Layout shell (after T1 completes)

futurPhases.phase5: Command System + Polish (Week 9-10) — CommandPalette, Shiki, Pierre
futurPhases.phase6: Fleet + Inference Control (Week 11-12) — FleetView, ProviderCard, CostTracker
futurPhases.phase8: Triggered procedures — task reclamation, phase transitions
futurPhases.phase9: Hybrid LLM Bridge — queue-driven inference via SpacetimeDB
